revision.comment: add {{[[Template:CatAutoTOC|CatAutoTOC]]}}, which will generate a table of contents (TOC) if the category has enough pages to need one
1 revision imported: importing wikipedia
fixing the uncategorized categories error
Adding [[Category:kk]][[category:kk]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Moving from [[Category:Kk]] to [[Category:&action=edit]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Moving from [[Category:&action=edit]] to [[Category:Uncategorized original categories]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Adding [[Category:attempting to force efresh]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Moving from [[Category:Uncategorized original categories]] to [[Category:year categories]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Attempting to force efresh]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates. [[{page.name}]]
Bot: tidy & size tag (1 members)
Text replacement - "(?<!<noinclude>)\{\{\s*[dD]raft categories\|([^}]+)\}\}(?!<\/noinclude>)" to "<noinclude>{{Draft categories|\1}}</noinclude> "
Bot: tag as Tier 0 category
Bot: confirm enwiki category & retag
revision.text:
{{Navseasoncats}} {{Portal|Religion}} {{CatAutoTOC}}
<noinclude>{{Draft categories| [[Category:Uncategorized categories]] [[Category:10th-century Buddhists|Nuns]] [[Category:10th-century nuns|Buddhist]] [[Category:Buddhist nuns by century]] [[Category:year categories]] }}</noinclude>
[[Category:Categories with 1 members]]
[[en:Category:10th-century Buddhist nuns]] [[Category:confirmed enwiki categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "↵↵" to " "
revision.text: {{Navseasoncats}} {{Portal|Religion}} {{CatAutoTOC}} <noinclude>{{Draft categories| [[Category:Uncategorized categories]] [[Category:10th-century Buddhists|Nuns]] [[Category:10th-century nuns|Buddhist]] [[Category:Buddhist nuns by century]] [[Category:year categories]] }}</noinclude> [[Category:Categories with 1 members]] [[en:Category:10th-century Buddhist nuns]] [[Category:confirmed enwiki categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:confirmed enwiki categories]]" to "[[en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[category:confirmed enwiki categories]]"
revision.text: {{Navseasoncats}} {{Portal|Religion}} {{CatAutoTOC}} <noinclude>{{Draft categories| [[Category:Uncategorized categories]] [[Category:10th-century Buddhists|Nuns]] [[Category:10th-century nuns|Buddhist]] [[Category:Buddhist nuns by century]] [[Category:year categories]] }}</noinclude> [[Category:Categories with 1 members]] [[en:Category:10th-century Buddhist nuns]] [[en:Category:10th-century Buddhist nuns]][[category:confirmed enwiki categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)
adding dummy category to make categories work
